fullArticle:
Chinese anime, known as donghua, has grown rapidly in recent years, with major titles capturing global attention. Much like Japanese anime, donghua offers stories across all genres and for all age ranges, ensuring that there is a series that appeals to every viewer. Some of these donghua even offer experiences that can rival or even surpass some of Japan’s best titles, making them thrilling and worthwhile stories to discover.

Many of these series have a distinctive identity compared to Japanese anime, often offering different perspectives or approaches and eye-catching styles that aren’t found in Japanese anime.
